---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or incorrect behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Clear description of the bug.

## Operating Mode

- [ ] Repo-Driven
- [ ] Spec-Driven

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens.

## Repo / Input (if Repo-Driven)

- Repo type: application / infrastructure / platform / gitops / mixed
- Key artifacts: (e.g., Terraform, Dockerfile, CI/CD)
- Relevant file paths

## Questionnaire Answers (if Spec-Driven)

If applicable, paste or summarize questionnaire answers.

## Environment

- How invoked: (e.g., Cursor, CLI, API)
- Version / commit: (if known)
